bullets: The development of AI-based projects including Time Table Generation system using constraint satisfaction algorithms

projects.title: Velora Transformer Training
projects.summary: A local-first LLaMA-style training stack with RoPE, RMSNorm, SwiGLU, GQA, checkpoint safety, and FineWeb-Edu workflows.

resume.summary: A local-first LLaMA-style training stack for safe small-model pretraining and SFT workflows.
bullets: Training Infrastructure: Built RoPE, RMSNorm, SwiGLU, GQA, checkpoint safety, and restartable training loops.
Data Pipeline: Prepared tokenizer, FineWeb-Edu, and SFT workflows with RAM-safe memmap loading.
Run Safety: Added micro-batch search, VRAM logging, and atomic checkpoint writes for interrupted runs.

projects.title: AI Fitness Trainer
projects.summary: A local computer-vision fitness coach using YOLOv11 pose estimation, Ollama vision feedback, rep counting, and voice guidance.

resume.summary: A local computer-vision fitness coach with pose tracking, form feedback, rep counting, and voice guidance.
bullets: Pose Tracking: Used YOLOv11 pose estimation for squats, bicep curls, and pushups.
Feedback Loop: Combined exercise geometry with local vision-model review through Ollama.
Product Flow: Delivered browser camera input, rep counting, and text-to-speech coaching.

projects.title: CityBuilder Simulation
projects.summary: A micro-city simulation with a FastAPI backend, React dashboard, resource loop, tests, exports, and deployment structure.

resume.summary: A micro-city simulation with a FastAPI service boundary, React dashboard, tests, and export structure.
bullets: Simulation Core: Modeled a predictable resource loop behind a FastAPI backend.
Dashboard: Built React and TypeScript controls for inspecting simulation state.
Engineering Hygiene: Added backend tests, exports, and deployment-oriented structure.

projects.title: Forest Protector
projects.summary: A Python tower-defense game with 10 escalating waves, 50 dynamic path combinations, tower upgrades, economy, and a live GitHub Pages build.

resume.summary: A Python tower-defense game with escalating waves, procedural path combinations, upgrades, and economy rules.
bullets: Game Systems: Implemented 10 waves, tower upgrades, enemy scaling, and economy balancing.
Procedural Variety: Created 50 path combinations across circular, straight, zigzag, spiral, and wave routes.
Published Build: Shipped a playable GitHub Pages version for direct review.

projects.title: AI Face Detect and Recognition WebGPU
projects.summary: A client-side AI face tracking and recognition application running YOLOv8 face detection and EdgeFace embeddings directly in the browser via WebGPU and ONNX Runtime.

resume.summary: A client-side AI face tracking and recognition application running YOLOv8 and EdgeFace directly in the browser via WebGPU and ONNX Runtime.
bullets: Browser-Based AI: Ran YOLOv8 face detection and EdgeFace embeddings in-browser via WebGPU/WASM ONNX Runtime.
FastAPI Backend: Designed a lightweight backend to host FAISS session indexes and JSON metadata.
Features: Built session persistence, pause/resume tracking states, and real-time cropping pipelines.

projects.title: MagneticStorage Neuro-Savant
projects.summary: A Python agentic memory system that organizes information into hierarchical concept groups and detail cells instead of a flat RAG index.

resume.summary: A Python agentic memory system that organizes information into hierarchical concept groups and detail cells.
bullets: Cellular Retrieval: Designed groups for concepts and cells for detailed vector-backed memories.
Consolidation Loop: Added sleep-mode merge and optimization passes to reduce duplicate memory groups.
Agent Tools: Built commands for status, visualization, persona behavior, story generation, GitHub ingestion, and checks.
